title: Minder Adam Phase 0+1A+1B complete — OpenCode ACP adapter pattern established
description: Adam COO operations layer Phase 0 (conventions), Phase 1A (OpenCode backbone), and Phase 1B (Duncan activity log) are implemented in minder. Key pattern: OpenCode ACP server is launched as a subprocess (opencode acp --port N --cwd path), communicated with via HTTP, and supervised by a background asyncio watcher task. Session state is persisted to data/adam/sessions.json. Windows toast via PowerShell WinRT from WSL. Duncan extracts activity from session-summary lugs, track.jsonl decisions, and completed lugs.
rationale: Establishes the first working pattern for AI agent session supervision in the Wheelwright fleet. The OpenCode ACP adapter contract and async watcher pattern are reusable for other tool integrations.
